notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom steals (1) 2nd base. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Tyler Soderstrom advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Austin Wells.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Brent Rooker steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes flies out to right fielder Aaron Judge.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. Amed Rosario out at 1st.
